titleStmt.title: SII 26.60: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 60. (A.R. No. 58 of 1909.) TIRUKKAḺUKKUṈṞAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the kitchen in the Bhaktavatsalēśvara temple, left of entrance.

This inscription is written below No. 59 above. The details of date given here are the same as found in No. 59 above and their equivalent is, therefore, 1406 A.D., October 27. The nakshatra ended on the previous day at ·40.

It seems to be in the nature of confirmation of the grant of the village Jananāthapuram alias Śirudaiyūr in Āyiravēlippaṟṟu to the temple of Tirumalaiyāḷuḍaiya nāyinār by the king as recorded in No. 59 above by the people (nāṭṭār) of Āyiravēlippaṟṟu in Āmūṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍa śōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīman mahāmaṇḍalīśvaran pratāpapokkarāyaṟku cellāniṉṟa śagābdam 1000 3 100 2 10 8 mel vyavaruṣattu paurṇmaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurkoṭṭattu Āyiravelippaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom Uṭaiyār is written above.yār
tirumalaiyāruṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tanmacātanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Eṅkaḷ paṟṟu ceṉanātanallūrāna ciṟutai Ūr nāṟpāṟkellaiyum tānamānnyam niṅkalāka mahā- pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum nāṭṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭiniṅkāt tevatānamāka Iṉta Ūril Irācakāttukku Irukkum poṉ AṟupatumviṉivaRead viṉiyokamum •
kamum Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭile Iṟaieṟṟikkoṇṭu candrātittavaraiyum Iṟuttuk kuṭuk kumpaṭi cammatittu cilārekaip paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirumalai yāḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārku Āyiravelipaṟṟu nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭikku Ivai vicamur kiḻavar Eḻuttu Ivai ciṟutai Ūr kiḻavar Eḻuttu Ivai Āmurnāṭṭu veḷār Eḻuttu
Ivai māppūti malaiyāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai poṉṉampalakūttaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ṟṟūrruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai vayyakaporaimalaikiniyaniṉṟāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nāṭṭukkaṇakku toṇṭai maṇṭala veḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
